body.title: Deprecate D331 — superseded by no-Igor-programming rule + DickSimnel escalation
body.result: Removed cmd_propose/cmd_approve from cc_queue.py (dead code, zero callers, Igor coding retired). Palace node D331 updated to SUPERSEDED. DickSimnel escalation chain is canonical path. Commit fb244949.
body.intention: I intend that stale decision infrastructure from April does not distract from current architecture.
body.description:
D331 (2026-04-08) implemented Igor propose→CC approve→resume flow for HIGH inertia escalation. Superseded by: (1) No Igor Programming rule (May 2026) — Igor coding retired, all work routes to CC; (2) D-dicksimnel-escalation-chain (2026-06-10) — DickSimnel tier routing + summarize-before-escalate already handles HIGH inertia escalation. T-design-escalation-path is done, T-design-escalation-path consequence was never filed. D331 infrastructure remains (cc_queue.py propose/approve commands, context-load 🟠 awaiting_approval surfacing) but is unused.

**Affected files:** lab/design_docs/, cc_queue.py (propose/approve commands)
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** Mark D331 closed; remove unused propose/approve command references; verify DickSimnel escalation is the canonical path
**Completion criteria:** D331 marked closed in palace.decisions.d331 or design_docs; T-design-escalation-path consequence ticket filed (deferred in original) or formally closed without; cc_queue.py propose/approve commands either (a) used by DickSimnel or (b) removed as dead code
